message:
fix: Re-enable SIMD with WAMR SIMDe support, improve error diagnostics

SIMD is critical for performance. WAMR fast-interpreter supports SIMD via SIMDe library (already enabled in build-wamr.sh with WAMR_BUILD_SIMD=1).

Changes:
- build.zig: Re-enable .simd128 feature for wasm32-wasi target
- runtime.zig: Wizer errors now fatal with diagnostic hints (from previous commit)
- wizer_wamr.zig: Detailed WAMR error messages (from previous commit)
- CI: Updated cache key to wamr-linux-simd-simde

The improved error messages will show the EXACT WAMR error if wizer fails, allowing us to fix the real issue instead of guessing.

Architecture: WASM with SIMD → Wizer with WAMR fast-interp+SIMDe → AOT with native SIMD
